jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at B.Braun India
jsonLd.description:
B.Braun India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!
